message.reasoning_content:
The user wants me to generate the content for Stage `web-004-shared-nav`. The goal is to create `site/page-4.html` and ensure a shared navigation structure is present across all pages (1 through 4). Existing files: 1. `site/index.html` (Needs modification to include shared nav) 2. `site/page-2.html` (Needs modification to include shared nav) 3. `site/page-3.html` (Needs modification to include shared nav) Expected artifacts: `site/page-4.html` (html) The shared navigation structure should link between all pages (1, 2, 3, 4). I need to generate the final state of all four files to satisfy the `shared-nav-all-pages` validator. **Shared Navigation Structure:** ```html
  • Home
  • Page 2
  • Page 3
  • Page 4
``` **1. Update `site/index.html`:** Current content: ```html Home Page

Welcome Home

This is the main content area for the homepage.

``` I need to replace the empty nav with the shared structure. **2. Update `site/page-2.html`:** Current content: ```html Page 2

This is Page 2

This is the content of the second page.

Go back to the Home Page (Page 1) ``` I need to insert the shared nav structure. **3. Update `site/page-3.html`:** Current content: ```html Page 3

This is Page 3

This is the content of the third page.

Go back to Page 2 ``` I need to insert the shared nav structure. **4. Create `site/page-4.html`:** This page needs the shared nav and its own content. I will generate the complete, modified content for all four files.
